name: Divinely Decadent Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the corn syrup and butter. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
2. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate until melted.
3. Add sugar, eggs, and vanilla; blend well.
4. Stir in flour and chopped nuts.
5. Grease a 9-inch layer cake pan with butter and dust with flour.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan. Cool completely on a wire rack.
9. To prepare glaze, melt chocolate and butter in a saucepan over low heat.
10. Remove from heat and stir in corn syrup and vanilla extract until smooth.
11. Pour the glaze over the cooled cake and let stand for one hour before serving.
12. Garnish with whole pecans or walnuts.
Origin: Great American Recipe cards.
